rationale: The page contains a single multiple-choice question from the UPSC 2022 exam regarding various Indian sports awards and their criteria.
cleanedText:
UPSC 2022
Q.10. Consider the following pairs with regard to sports awards:
1. Major Dhyan Chand Khel Ratna Award: For the most Spectacular and outstanding performance by a sportsperson over period of last four years
2. Arjuna Award: For the lifetime achievement by a sportsperson
3. Dronacharya Award or teams: To honour eminent coaches who have successfully trained sportspersons or teams
4. Rashtriya Khel Protshan Puraskar: To recognize the contribution made by sportspersons even after their retirement
How many of the above pairs are correctly matched?
(a) Only one
(b) Only two
(c) Only three
(d) All four
ANSWER: B
